---
name: Share what you built
about: Tell us what you forked, adapted, or ran inside your own company
title: "[Built] "
labels: showcase
---

**What did you build or adapt?**
<!-- One or two sentences. e.g. "Forked the CS triage skill for a food brand." -->

**Company context (optional, no private data)**
<!-- Vertical, rough size, what systems you wired in. Skip anything sensitive. -->

**What worked**
<!-- The parts that delivered. -->

**What broke or surprised you**
<!-- The honest part. This is the most useful section for the next operator. -->

**What you'd change**
<!-- If you started again. -->

**Can we add you to the public "who's building on this" list?**
<!-- Yes / No / Anonymized only -->
